TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Wink_Bowman, title = Wink_Bowman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wink_Bowman} }

S.FORM: Wink Bowman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1916 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 1, Wink Bowman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Wink Bowman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1916 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 1, Wink Bowman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2001) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wink βowman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, wink βowman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
